name: BB:BehaviourDefinition: Modification in Instance Profile (AWS)
notes: This Building Block defines a change in the instance profile value on AWS. An instance profile contains one role, and the role can be changed at will. For example, a "Restricted Instance Profile" with a "Restricted Role" can be changed to instead have an "Admin Role". The instance profile name does not change in this case, which is more difficult to notice.
bb_references: BB:BehaviourDefinition: Modification in Instance Profile (AWS) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Amazon AWS CloudTrail
when the event QID is one of the following (88750054) Add Role To Instance Profile, (88750712) Remove Role From Instance Profile
when the event matches Profile (custom) is not N/A
when at least 2 events are seen with the same Profile (custom) and different QID in 1 hour(s)
thresholds: when at least 2 events are seen with the same Profile (custom) and different QID in 1 hour(s)
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviourDefinition: Modification in Instance Profile (AWS) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Amazon AWS CloudTrail
AND when the event QID is one of the following (88750054) Add Role To Instance Profile, (88750712) Remove Role From Instance Profile
AND when the event matches Profile (custom) is not N/A
AND when at least 2 events are seen with the same Profile (custom) and different QID in 1 hour(s)
